title: Agentic commerce: why AI agents are transforming the ecommerce landscape
summary: The core operational challenge for the merchant remains the payment layer. Agents can combine individual lessons from multiple providers to create a tailored learning experience, while the underlying payment infrastructure fragments and distributes the value seamlessly across all accessed merchants.
